title: Set up MongoDB with Mongoose in Next.js
summary: Install Mongoose, configure a singleton connection safe for Next.js serverless/hot-reload, define typed schemas, and implement CRUD operations.
declaration: I will integrate MongoDB using Mongoose into this Next.js project. This includes a connection singleton safe for serverless and hot-reload environments, TypeScript-typed schemas, and CRUD patterns. If you need a different MongoDB driver (native driver, Prisma with MongoDB), say so before I begin.
